notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Hao-Yu Lee. Ben Williamson to 2nd. Ben Williamson advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Hao-Yu Lee.
